factual_uncertainty: Parnar v. Americana Hotels citation 65 Haw. 370 (1982) with public-policy doctrine refined through subsequent decisions including 1984 follow-on; verify exact year of leading proposition with primary case docket before relying on date in any client matter

factual_uncertainty: HRS 388-3 final-pay rule cited as 'immediately at discharge or by the next regular payday at the latest if conditions prevent immediate payment' — verify exact statutory wording and Wage Standards Division enforcement bulletins before relying on the safety-valve phrasing

factual_uncertainty: HRS chapter 394B Dislocated Workers Act four-week allowance characterised from statute summary; verify the eligible-worker definition, the exact allowance calculation method, and the agency that adjudicates eligibility before relying on the $336,000 illustrative number

factual_uncertainty: Hawaii Family Leave Law (HRS chapter 398) cited at 100+ employee threshold and 4 weeks per calendar year; verify the exact employee threshold and leave duration in 2026 before relying on the figure
